Section 721, , , , related to judicial review, providing in former subsec. (a) for appeal by State of Commissioner’s final action to court of appeals; subsec. (c) jurisdiction of court of appeals and review by Supreme Court.Pub. L. 88–204, title I, § 11177 Stat. 370Dec. 16, 1963
